stemHtml: What is the reason a DME-interrogator makes use of an irregular transmission sequence?

options.a: In this way the DME-transponder is able to determine from which aircraft each sequence of pulse pairs is received.
options.b: In this way the DME-interrogator is able to distinguish between his own reply pulse pairs and the reply pulse pairs of other aircraft.
options.c: In this way the DME-interrogator is able to estimate the size of the error in the range measurement.
options.d: In this way the DME-transponder is able to apply the correct delay time to each sequence of pulse pairs received.
